intended_use.summary: Evaluate the official McKenzie HUC8 17090004 NWI ZIP route for selection into a separate future ignored-local controlled-intake contract and attributed derived wetlands/deepwater exclusion context; do not acquire or use the archive in this assessment.

sources.name: USFWS National Wetlands Inventory McKenzie HUC8 watershed package

evidence.note: No-redirect HEAD returned 200, application/zip, 28,966,292 bytes, last-modified 2026-05-04, exact ETag and provider version ID, with zero body bytes.
Official USGS HUC table contains 17090004 and McKenzie.

criteria.note: Exact external asset and geography identities are established; internal archive identity remains a fitness/provenance blocker.

evidence.note: Live federal catalog identifies the National Wetlands Inventory and Fish and Wildlife Service publisher.
Official NWI FAQ publishes watershed download guidance and the current 2026 release citation.

criteria.note: USFWS is authoritative for NWI and USGS is authoritative for the HUC name table.

evidence.note: Canonical download guidance returned direct HTTP 200 with no redirect and describes watershed ZIP access for GIS analysis.
Anonymous no-redirect HEAD returned HTTP 200 without an account, fee, cookie, credential, or body.

criteria.note: Metadata access is currently available; availability, rate limits, and intake authorization are not implied.

evidence.note: Official guidance offers watershed ZIP downloads for GIS analysis.
FWS says not all site information is public domain, requests credit, and restricts logo use.
Current terms decision blocks selection, acquisition, and derived publication; raw redistribution is prohibited.

criteria.note: No exact asset-specific grant resolves the complete proposed local retention/processing and derived-publication posture.

evidence.note: FAQ says individual imagery dates govern mapped wetland validity.
Official external route is bound, but archive members, contributors, projects, dates, notices, and transformations remain unopened.

criteria.note: Asset-level origin is clear, but member/project lineage required for the proposed evidence use is absent.

evidence.note: HEAD binds length, last-modified, ETag, provider version ID, media type, and range support; ETag is not treated as a cryptographic checksum.

Future plan requires re-HEAD, no-overwrite quarantine, streamed SHA-256/BLAKE3, exact length/version checks, ZIP CRC/member hashes, path/type/expansion controls, and no source use until inspection passes.

criteria.note: A deterministic post-acquisition integrity plan exists; this assessment acquires nothing.

evidence.note: Official page preserves omission, scale, field, and mapping limitations.
Official user caution preserves imagery-date, currency, interpretation, and non-regulatory limits.
Official disclaimer rejects regulatory and presence/absence interpretations and warns about landscape change.

criteria.note: Expected layers and CRS are guidance only; exact project dates, scale, status, coverage, geometry, Petes relationship, and residual uncertainty are unknown.

evidence.note: Metadata is public; future ZIP is untrusted and must pass traversal, symlink, expansion, type, contact, locator, attribute, notice, and logo screening before derived publication.
Current notice provides credit and logo restrictions that the publication plan preserves.

criteria.note: Metadata-only assessment is safe; explicit controls cover a future untrusted archive.

blocking_reasons: The exact asset-specific local retention/processing and derived-publication rights remain unknown.
Archive member/project provenance, notices, mapping projects, imagery dates, and transformations remain unopened.
Project dates, scale, status, structure, coverage, geometry, Petes relationship, and scientific fitness remain unknown.
Three exploratory failed attempts lack one or more exact request locator or observation-time fields; those trace gaps are retained and not reconstructed.
